events.title: Bhaagam-Bhaag
events.description: Welcome to the Ultimate Challenge! Four teams, each consisting of four members, will compete simultaneously in a thrilling, fast-paced game. Two exciting mini-games await each team, but they are interconnected—you must conquer both to proceed!

events.title: Inaugration of Apoorv
events.description: Official inauguration ceremony of Apoorv 2025

events.title: Code Quest - Day 1
events.description: CodeQuest is a two-day competitive programming event at Apoorv Tech Fest, designed to push participants' problem-solving, teamwork, and adaptability to the limit. Through a series of innovative rounds, coders will engage in unconventional challenges that test logic, communication, and strategy.

events.title: Print Scapes
events.description: Immerse yourself in the world of monoprinting at Printscapes: A Monoprinting Journey! In this event, artists will create one-of-a-kind prints using traditional monoprinting techniques

events.title: DJ Night
events.description: Dance and music with DJ performances

events.title: Animaniac
events.description: In a realm where intellect reigns, warriors unite in squads of four, battling in duels where strategy and reflexes decide fate. Enigmatic power-ups shift destinies, shattering advantages in an instant. Only those who wield wisdom with precision shall rise as the Ultimate Anime Champions !

events.title: Beyond The Harmony
events.description:
Ready to let your voice shine at Beyond the Harmony?
This is your stage to showcase your vocal talent and unleash your creativity. Whether you're a beginner or a pro, it's your time to shine! Be part of an inspiring and captivating musical experience.

events.title: MUN
events.description: Ever wonder what it takes to be a world leader? We’ll give you the chance to find out and dive into the world of diplomacy and debate! Apoorv 2025 presents the Model United Nations (MUN), your chance to step into the shoes of a world leader and tackle pressing international issues. forge diplomatic alliances, and craft innovative solutions for a brighter future.

events.title: Face Off
events.description: The Ultimate Face Painting Challenge invites artists to turn faces into stunning works of art! From nature and fantasy to abstract and pop culture, showcase your creativity on a living canvas. Get ready for a vibrant journey of artistry and fun!

events.title: Auction
events.description: Bidding event for various items

events.title: Code Quest - Day 2
events.description: CodeQuest is a two-day competitive programming event at Apoorv Tech Fest, designed to push participants' problem-solving, teamwork, and adaptability to the limit. Through a series of innovative rounds, coders will engage in unconventional challenges that test logic, communication, and strategy.

events.title: Instrumental Performance
events.description: Live instrumental music performances

events.title: Musical Performance
events.description: Special musical performance

events.title: Enigma
events.description: Mystery solving event

events.title: Trivia Rush
events.description: Calling all trivia buffs, knowledge enthusiasts, and quick thinkers! Are you ready to test your intellect in a high-stakes showdown of strategy and smarts? Brace yourself for an electrifying competition where the sharpest minds will clash, the pressure will mount, and only one team will claim the title of Trivia Rush Champion.

events.title: Reel to Real
events.description: Apoorv’25 presents "Reel to Real: Character Comeback"—a stage for movie lovers to bring their favorite characters to life! Dress up, deliver an iconic dialogue, and showcase your acting skills for exciting prizes. Whether hero or villain, step into the spotlight and celebrate the magic of cinema.

events.title: Concert
events.description: Live music concert

events.title: Cinevedika
events.description: Short film screening event

events.title: Tuning
events.description: Sound check and equipment setup

events.title: Pulse and Beats
events.description: Get ready for an unforgettable dance extravaganza with "Pulse and Beats," a group dance competition by Apoorv '25 that will set the stage on fire with pulsating rhythms and electrifying beats.

events.title: Solo Sizzle
events.description: Apoorv’25 presents the Annual Solo Dance—a celebration of rhythm, grace, and talent! Performers showcase creativity, blending genres with personal flair in a mesmerizing dance extravaganza. Feel the energy as the audience cheers for every move!

events.title: Apoorv's Got Talent
events.description: MindQuest presents "Apoorv's Got Latent" – an exciting event celebrating not just your amazing talents but also the ones you're absolutely terrible at! (It’s Latent after all—you don’t have to be great, just self-aware since you rate yourself!)

events.title: Strings and Keys
events.description: Get ready to showcase your talent at Strings and Keys Apoorv's instrumental competition! Whether you’re a beginner or a pro, this is your chance to let your music shine. Open to all music lovers, the event offers exciting prizes, a stage to perform, and an experience to remember.

events.title: Tech Talk
events.description:
We have an exciting tech talk lined up for you in Tapovan featuring Gaurav Ghai, a founding member of AlmaBetter. He will be sharing valuable insights on LinkedIn optimization, resume building, and job/internship search—essential skills to boost your career!

🔹 Why should you attend?
✅ Learn how to perfect your LinkedIn profile
✅ Get expert resume-building tips
✅ Master job & internship search strategies
⏳ Come early to grab the best seats! You don’t want to miss out on this one. 

See you all there! 🚀

events.title: Ultimate Dance Showdown
events.description: Experience the thrill of Apoorv ‘25, an electrifying dance competition where teams of five dancers showcase their talent, creativity, and high-energy performances. Each team must include at least one female member, ensuring diverse and dynamic choreography. Get ready to witness a spectacular display of rhythm, coordination, and artistic expression as the stage comes alive with passion and intensity!

events.title: CONCERT CLG(Reverb)
events.description: College concert featuring Reverb

events.title: Vougue Fusion
events.description: Gear up to dazzle the world with your style! The Vogue Fusion is your chance to showcase a unique blend of cultures and eras, creating stunning and versatile outfits. Express your creativity, mix and match styles, and let your fusion fashion leave everyone in awe. Let’s add beauty to Apoorv’25 and light up the campus with our dazzling ensembles!

events.title: Non-competitive Dance
events.description: Dance performances for entertainment

events.title: Tuning
events.description: Sound check and equipment setup

events.title: Break It To Make It
events.description:
This challenge tests participants’ ability to analyze and reconstruct electronic circuits in a simulated environment.

Participants will reverse-engineer a given circuit, understand its components and interactions, and replicate its functionality using a simulation tool.

The event enhances skills in circuit analysis, debugging, and design, providing hands-on experience in practical electronics and simulation.

events.title: Drama Act
events.description: Theatrical performances and drama acts

events.title: Stage Buster
events.description: Stage Buster brings movies to life with dramatic recreations and spontaneous character impersonations! A thrilling stage for actors and movie lovers alike, it blends creativity, teamwork, and electrifying performances that keep the audience hooked. Get ready for a cinematic spectacle like never before!

events.title: Open Mic
events.description: A chance to step onto the stage, a mic in your hand, and unleash those words—be it a poem, rap, stand-up, story, beatbox, or monologue. No rules, no judgment, just a few ears to listen... or maybe a chance to impress your crush! Who knows? They might just fall for your killer knock-knock jokes!
